prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次为约 10197→15770→13906→11500→10380 名，整体呈大幅波动后回稳趋势；2022 年因断档跌至 15770 名，随后逐年回升，2025 年基准约 10380 名，已接近 2021 年水平；本省物理类计划 2021 年 62 人、2022–2023 年 64 人、2024 年 65 人、2025 年 72 人；2026 年计划 76 人，较 2025 年扩招约 5.6%，扩招对竞争有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 暨南大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名 2021 年第 57→2022 年第 47→2023 年第 50→2024 年第 51→2025 年第 55→2026 年第 59 名，近年排名略有后移但仍处全国前 60 强；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及宿舍安检等校园管理话题，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 41（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度一般；近年未见明显投档断档记录；新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A-、中国语言文学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-；计算机、人工智能、软件工程等热门工科专业虽未直接获评 A 类学科，但依托学校综合实力，报考热度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、软件工程等专业社会热度持续偏高；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 15.4 万，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类约 11.6 万）大幅增长约 32.5%，按近年物理类占比约 72% 估算，物理类考生约 11.1 万，竞争显著加剧；暨南大学位于广东广州，属一线城市热门地域，对内蒙古考生有一定吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生规模适中， 2026 年物理类 76 人，属该校在非本省省份中招生人数较多的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次回稳趋势、2026 年小幅扩招（+4 人）及本省物理类考生大幅增加（约 +32.5%），扩招的缓解效应远不及考生增长的竞争压力，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年进一步加剧；预测最低位次约 10926 名，区间 10426–11426 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 10197 → 15770 → 13906 → 11500 → 10380, showing a trend of significant fluctuation followed by stabilization; in 2022, due to a gap, it dropped to 15770, then gradually recovered, with the 2025 baseline around 10380, close to the 2021 level; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 62 in 2021, 64 in 2022–2023, 65 in 2024, 72 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 76, an increase of about 5.6% compared to 2025, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026 is 57th → 47th → 50th → 51st → 55th → 59th, with a slight decline in recent years but still within the top 60 nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management topics such as dormitory security checks, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure and general application attention; no significant admission gaps have been observed in recent years; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-; popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Software Engineering, though not directly rated as A-class disciplines, have high application popularity due to the university's comprehensive strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Software Engineering continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.5% compared to 2025 (History Category + Physics Category about 116,000); estimated at about 72% Physics Category proportion in recent years, Physics Category candidates are about 111,000, significantly intensifying competition; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city in a popular region, attracting some Inner Mongolia candidates; the university's enrollment scale in this province is moderate, with 76 Physics Category spots in 2026, making it one of the provinces with higher enrollment numbers outside its home province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking stabilization trend, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+4 students), and the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (about +32.5%), the alleviating effect of expansion is far outweighed by the competitive pressure from candidate growth; it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10926, with a range of 10426–11426.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10426–11426, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Computer Science and Clinical Medicine; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 11400), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net and carefully choose Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言文学、新闻学等文科专业社会热度整体平稳偏热；本省 2026 年高考总人数约 15.4 万，较 2025 年大幅增长约 32.5%，按近年历史类占比约 28% 估算，历史类考生约 4.3 万，竞争显著加剧；暨南大学位于广东广州，一线城市对文科考生吸引力较强；2026 年历史类计划 17 人，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移（1434 名）的强势表现、2026 年小幅缩招（-1 人）及本省历史类考生大幅增加（约 +32.5%），考生增长带来的竞争压力显著大于缩招影响，预计 2026 年位次较 2025 年略有后移；预测最低位次约 1416 名，区间 1161–1671 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1732 → 2476 → 2140 → 2385 → 1434. From 2022 to 2024, the overall range fluctuated between 2100 and 2500, and in 2025 it significantly advanced to 1434, the best in recent years, with a baseline ranking of about 1434. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 19 in 2021, 17 in 2022–2024, and 18 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 17, a reduction of 1 (-5.6%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been stable in the 47–59 range in recent years, ranking 59th in 2026, placing it among the top comprehensive universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with moderate attention. No records of enrollment gaps have been observed. It has A-level disciplines in Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, A- in Applied Economics, and A- in Chinese Language and Literature. Although Law has not been rated as A-level, it is a traditionally strong major outside the Five Institutes and Four Departments, with high social recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism have generally stable to hot social popularity. The total number of provincial college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.5% compared to 2025. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 28%, there are approximately 43,000 History Category candidates, significantly intensifying competition. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city that is relatively attractive to liberal arts candidates. The 2026 History Category enrollment plan is 17, maintaining a stable scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the 2025 ranking significantly advancing (1434), the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-1), and the substantial increase in provincial History Category candidates (about +32.5%), the competitive pressure from candidate growth is significantly greater than the impact of enrollment reduction. It is predicted that the 2026 ranking will slightly retreat compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1416, with a range of 1161–1671.
